seo.title: Top 50 JavaScript Interview Questions 2026 | Answers & Examples
seo.description: Master the top 50 JavaScript interview questions for 2026. Covers closures, the event loop, ES6+, async/await, prototypes, and DOM manipulation with detailed answers.
seo.keywords: javascript interview questions 2026, JS interview questions and answers, closures javascript, event loop interview, async await interview

hero.title: JavaScript Interview Questions 2026
hero.description: The definitive guide to JavaScript interview questions. Covers everything from core fundamentals to advanced patterns used in modern React and Node.js applications.

topTips: Practice coding closures and currying by hand without Google.
Draw out the event loop on paper — interviewers love when you can visualize it.
Know the difference between null, undefined, NaN, and 0 (all falsy, but different).
Practice Promise chaining and async/await error handling with try/catch.
Understand 'this' in all 4 scenarios: global, method, function, and arrow function.
